root_cause: Lambda IAM role missing S3 PutObject permission
error_message: AccessDenied: User is not authorized to perform: s3:PutObject
evidence: Lambda attempting to write to S3 bucket
IAM role has S3 GetObject but not PutObject
Error occurs during S3 write operation
resolution: Added S3 PutObject permission to Lambda IAM role
preventive_measures: Test IAM permissions in staging environment
Use IAM policy simulator to validate permissions
Document required permissions in deployment guide
